procedureName: Interest and Penalties under Income Tax
description: Comprehensive reference for interest (Sections 234A, 234B, 234C, 244A) and penalties (234F, 270A, 271B, 271H) applicable for FY 2025-26 ITR filings.

interestProvisions.name: Interest for Late Filing of Return
interestProvisions.from: August 1, 2026 (day after original due date for most individuals)
interestProvisions.to: Date of actual filing of return
interestProvisions.base: Amount of tax payable on total income minus advance tax minus TDS
interestProvisions.notes: Zero if no tax is due (TDS + advance tax ≥ total tax). Waived if income below exemption limit.

interestProvisions.name: Interest for Default in Payment of Advance Tax
interestProvisions.to: Date of payment of self-assessment tax (or date of assessment order)
interestProvisions.base: Assessed tax minus advance tax paid. If advance tax ≥ 90% of total assessed tax, no 234B.
interestProvisions.trigger: Advance tax paid < 90% of final tax liability
interestProvisions.notes: Most common interest. Applies when total advance tax is significantly short.

interestProvisions.name: Interest for Deferment of Advance Tax (Installment Default)
interestProvisions.presumptiveException: Taxpayers u/s 44AD/44ADA/44AE: Pay full advance tax in single installment by March 15, 2026. No 234C for first 3 installments if March 15 deadline met.

interestProvisions.name: Interest Payable by Government on Refund
interestProvisions.rate: 6% per annum (0.5% per month, simple interest)
interestProvisions.from: April 1 of the Assessment Year (if return filed by due date); Date of filing (if belated return)
interestProvisions.minimum: No interest if refund < 10% of tax as assessed
interestProvisions.notes: Interest u/s 244A received from department is itself taxable as income from other sources in year of receipt.

feeAndPenalties.name: Fee for Late Filing
feeAndPenalties.amount: ₹5,000 if total income > ₹5 lakh; ₹1,000 if total income ≤ ₹5 lakh; NIL if income below basic exemption limit
feeAndPenalties.notes: Late fee applies even if no tax is due (e.g., TDS fully covers tax). Mandatory — AO cannot waive.

feeAndPenalties.name: Penalty for Under-Reporting or Misreporting Income
feeAndPenalties.underReportingPenalty: 50% of tax payable on under-reported income
feeAndPenalties.underReporting: Income declared is less than assessed income — inadvertent errors
feeAndPenalties.misReporting: Fraudulent or false claims — bogus deductions, inflated expenses, suppressed income

feeAndPenalties.name: Penalty for Failure to Get Tax Audit
feeAndPenalties.amount: 0.5% of total sales/turnover or gross receipts, or ₹1,50,000 — whichever is lower
feeAndPenalties.trigger: Business/professional taxpayer fails to get accounts audited u/s 44AB despite mandatory requirement

feeAndPenalties.name: Penalty for Failure to File TDS/TCS Return
feeAndPenalties.trigger: Deductor fails to file quarterly TDS return (24Q, 26Q, 27Q, 27EQ) within time

feeAndPenalties.name: Penalty for Failure to Furnish Return (other than income return)
feeAndPenalties.trigger: Failure to file annual information returns, statement of financial transactions, etc.

commonMistakes: Forgetting 234B interest when computing self-assessment tax — underpayment
Not computing 234C for each installment separately — different base amounts
Ignoring 234A when filing belated return — it adds significantly to tax due
Thinking 234F (late fee) only applies if tax is due — it applies even if fully refunded
